name: CREATIVE KILL CHAMBER
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Game is played with mouse.
Quick Summary of the Game: Creative Kill Chamber is a super addictive online game where you play as a prisoner trying to escape from a high-security facility. You have to use your cunning and wits to outsmart your captors and take them out one by one. The game is filled with tons of cool weapons and gadgets that you can use to create your own unique kill strategies. It’s got a great mix of action, strategy, and humor that keeps you on the edge of your seat.

name: DREADHEAD PARKOUR
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Run right - D
Run left - A
Jump - W
Slide - S
Quick Summary of the Game: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled adventure in Dreadhead Parkour, a dynamic game featuring the stylish protagonist, Dreadhead. Navigate through challenging levels with slides, backflips, and frontflips to reach the finish line. Gather coins to unlock diverse skins and strive for the highest scores. Stay alert as you encounter obstacles like bombs, spikes, and colossal jumps, testing the limits of your parkour skills. With a mix of daring moves and strategic maneuvers, Dreadhead Parkour promises an intense and thrilling experience. How hardcore can you go in this ultimate parkour challenge?

name: HANGER
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Game is played with mouse.
Quick Summary of the Game: Experience the thrill of Hanger, an exhilarating arcade game that puts you in control of a daring ragdoll character swinging through the air. Channel your inner Spiderman as you navigate challenging levels, using precision to shoot ropes at just the right moment. Timing is everything - go too early or too late, and you risk losing body parts! The game ramps up the difficulty, pushing you to beat your high score. With physics-driven gameplay, collectible coins for character unlocks, and traps that can tear you apart, Hanger promises a gravity-defying adventure. Good luck swinging!
